generated_oml:
instance PhysicalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of the gantry crane system"
    base:contains CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalEnvironment
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital twin of the gantry crane system"
    base:contains Fusion360CADModel, KinematicModel, SimulationServiceModel, TimescaleDBData, GrafanaData, Docker, TimescaleDB, Grafana, MosquittoMQTTBroker, GantrylibPythonModule, GitHub, TrajectoryGenerationService, ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService, DataLoggingService, CraneSimulationService, OptimalTrajectoryInsight, DiscrepancyAlertInsight, CorrectiveAction, VisualizationInsight, HistoricalDataInsight, SimulationResultInsight
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Acquires sensor data and control signals for physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance TimescaleDBData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB for historical logging"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance GrafanaData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data visualized in Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TimescaleDBData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Grafana
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization of crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance SimulationServiceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane behavior simulation services"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement along gantry"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist vertical movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Picks up containers at end of hoist"
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization tool for deploying digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, CraneSimulationService, DataVisualizationService, DataLoggingService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing historical crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time and historical data dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance GantrylibPythonModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Repository hosting for digital twin code and models"
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DiscrepancyAlertInsight, CorrectiveAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Crane behavior simulation services"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal movement paths for crane to minimize time and energy"
]

instance DiscrepancyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert when simulation-measurement discrepancies exceed thresholds"
]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator takes corrective action based on validation discrepancies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical data visualization for operators"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Archived data for trend analysis and reporting"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated crane behavior results for planning and validation"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Human Machine Interface are sent via the Control Application and Physical Crane Interface to the motor controllers and electromagnet for physical movement execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Five physical containers (Physical Crane, Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, HMI) and six digital containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, MQTT Broker) interconnected via MQTT and Python modules."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics against an acceptable threshold; breaches trigger operator notifications via the dashboard."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto broker for communication between physical and digital components; data flows through Physical Crane Interface to Logging Application and database."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a personal computer using Docker containers for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; gantrylib Python module installed via pip for control applications."
]
